ddt:Target.Name: N_H60B_EMCU_EIPF_20170201
ddt:Target.Description:
[1] NISSAN XX6 R. Urushihata 2017/02/01 Removed FFD request $12. [[2.17]]
[N] NISSAN XX6 R. Urushihata 2016/4/20
Initial Create based on "N_X32L_EMCU_ECMBASE_20110317.xml". [[2.17]]

Item.Text: Sub-pump relay drive circuit VB shorted[P3078]
